welcomeTitle: Ask about Indian law in plain language
welcomeBody: Get clear answers with the exact sections they come from. This is legal information to help you understand your situation — not a substitute for a lawyer.
examples: What is the punishment for cheating under IPC 420?
How do I file an FIR, and what if the police refuse?
My in-laws are harassing me for dowry — what law applies?
Can I be denied a government job for a small mistake in my form?

ask.title: Ask a legal question
ask.body: Get a clear answer cited to current law (BNS / BNSS / BSA) and Supreme Court judgments.

understand.title: Understand a document
understand.body: Upload an FIR, notice, or agreement — get it explained in plain words, with any deadlines.

draft.title: Draft a letter or complaint
draft.body: RTI, consumer complaint, or police complaint — drafted and ready to file.

verifyWarn: This reference could not be fully matched to a source — treat it with caution.
judgmentNotice: Court judgment — persuasive, not the binding text of the law.
errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the legal assistant. Make sure the backend is running, then try again.
errorGeneric: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
footerNote: Information, not legal advice — verify before you rely on it.
feedbackThanks: Thanks — your feedback helps improve this.
draftMenuTitle: What do you want to draft?

about.title: About & limitations
about.whatBody: NyaySetu is a free assistant that helps people in India understand the law in plain language — answering questions and explaining documents, with citations to the exact current-law sections (BNS / BNSS / BSA) and Supreme Court judgments they come from.
about.howBody: Your question is matched against a library of Indian legal sources; an AI then writes the answer using only what it found, and every section it cites is checked back against those sources. When it isn't confident, it says so and points you to free legal aid instead of guessing.
limits: This is legal information, not legal advice — and using it does not create a lawyer–client relationship.
AI can make mistakes. Check anything important against the official bare act or with a lawyer before you act on it.
It cannot replace a lawyer for your specific situation, represent you, or guarantee any outcome.
Laws and sources change; some information may be out of date.
about.privacyBody: There is no login or account. Your question is sent to the AI engine only to generate your answer. Please avoid sharing sensitive personal details you wouldn't want processed. We do not sell your data.
about.helpBody: For free, official legal help, contact your District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) or call the NALSA legal-aid helpline at 15100.
about.reviewNote: This is a plain-language summary; a formal Privacy Policy and Terms, reviewed by a legal professional, will follow.
